analysis: You hit 8:55pm on Monday which is basically on target, and Sunday's 9:11pm was close enough that I'm counting it as a win. The fragmentation in the early hours of Monday morning is the thing worth noticing — you had seven separate wake events between midnight and 5:39am, which is a lot of interruption even if the total hours look okay on paper. Tuesday you were back asleep before 9pm and the architecture looks cleaner, less chopping around in the deep end of the night. The afternoon nap on Sunday — that hour-five from 2pm — probably nudged your sleep pressure down just enough to make the late wakes more likely, something to play with if it keeps happening.
